title: chrusoo #5558
definition:
1) to adorn with gold, to gild
    1a) of a woman ornamented with gold so profusely that she seems to
        be gilded
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to adorn with gold, to gild
    1a) of a woman ornamented with gold so profusely that she seems to
        be gilded

    NASB:  to gild, to cover with gold:
